title: Allow More Than 1 Pricing Table on Quotes

posts.author: rock3 (Rocco Errichetto III)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be nice to have the ability to add more than 1 pricing table to a quote, along with editable labels for subtotal/total to allow “Purchase Price” and “Monthly Price” tobles and totals.

What are you trying to achieve

This would allow break down of products and/or services that will be purchased, vs. products and/or services that are billed monthly.
